hajj.title: Economy Hajj Package
hajj.description: Our Economy Hajj Package is designed for pilgrims seeking a spiritual journey with essential comforts at an affordable price. Experience the blessed pilgrimage with reliable services and guidance.

itinerary.title: Madinah Arrival
itinerary.description: Arrival in Madinah, check-in at hotel, and 5 days stay for Ziarat and prayers at Masjid-an-Nabawi.

itinerary.title: Makkah & Umrah
itinerary.description: Transfer to Makkah, perform Umrah, and stay near Haram for spiritual devotion.

itinerary.title: Hajj Days (Mina/Arafat)
itinerary.description: Moving to Mina, Arafat, and Muzdalifah for the core Hajj rituals.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Final Tawaf and departure from Jeddah airport.

hajj.title: Standard Hajj Package
hajj.description: The Standard Hajj Package offers a balanced experience with closer hotel locations and enhanced transportation services during the holy days of Hajj.

itinerary.title: Madinah Stay
itinerary.description: 7 days in Madinah with guided spiritual sessions.

itinerary.title: Makkah & Hajj
itinerary.description: Performance of Hajj rituals with standard tent facilities in Mina.

itinerary.title: Final Days & Return
itinerary.description: Post-Hajj rest in Makkah and departure.

umrah.title: Executive Umrah Package by Bus – 10 Days
umrah.description: Experience a spiritually fulfilling and budget-friendly Umrah journey with Flying Zone UAE. This 10-day group package is designed for pilgrims who seek comfort, guidance, and affordability — all in one complete experience. Travel in a well-organized group with professional support, comfortable transport, and carefully selected accommodations close to Haram.

itinerary.title: Departure from UAE
itinerary.description: Your blessed journey begins as you depart from the UAE. Travel comfortably in a luxury air-conditioned bus with fellow pilgrims.

itinerary.title: Arrival at Meeqat & Umrah
itinerary.description: Arrival at Meeqat and intention for Umrah (Ihram). Proceed towards Makkah, perform Umrah under guidance, and hotel check-in near Haram. Mandatory Umrah briefing session by expert guide.

itinerary.title: Jummah in Makkah
itinerary.description: Perform Jummah Prayer at Haram. Spend the day in Ibadah (worship), Tawaf, and personal prayers. Experience the peaceful spiritual environment of Makkah.

itinerary.title: Free Day (Ibadah & Reflection)
itinerary.description: Free day dedicated to personal prayers. Optional Tawaf, Quran recitation, and prayers at Haram.

itinerary.title: Makkah Ziarat (Included)
itinerary.description: Guided Ziarat tour of Makkah. Visit important Islamic historical sites and learn the significance of each location with expert guidance.

itinerary.title: Free Day & Last Tawaf
itinerary.description: Free time for additional Ziarat or personal worship. Perform your Last Tawaf (Tawaf Al-Wida) in Makkah.

itinerary.title: Travel to Madinah
itinerary.description: Departure from Makkah to Madinah. Arrival at Masjid an-Nabawi. Guided Ziarat of Madinah and hotel check-in.

itinerary.title: Visit to Riaz ul Jannah
itinerary.description: Free day for Riaz ul Jannah visit (as per schedule/permit). Spend time in prayers at Masjid an-Nabawi.

itinerary.title: Jummah & Return Journey
itinerary.description: Perform Jummah Prayer in Madinah. Begin your journey back to the UAE with unforgettable spiritual memories.

inclusions: Luxury Air-Conditioned Bus Travel (with Washroom & WiFi)
highlights: Pickup from Dubai, Sharjah, Abu Dhabi, Jebel Ali
Wednesday Departure with Luxury Bus Support
Free WiFi in KSA to stay connected

umrah.title: Standard Umrah Package by Air – 08 Days
umrah.description: Experience a comfortable and time-saving Umrah journey with our air travel package. Designed for pilgrims who prefer convenience and efficiency, this package includes return flights, comfortable accommodations, and complete ground support in Saudi Arabia for a smooth and spiritually fulfilling experience.

itinerary.title: Departure from Dubai & Arrival in Jeddah
itinerary.description: Departure from Dubai via flight. Arrival at Jeddah Airport. Transfer to Makkah via private transport and hotel check-in.

itinerary.title: Umrah & Briefing
itinerary.description: Proceed for Umrah with guidance, perform Umrah rituals, and attend the mandatory Umrah briefing session.

itinerary.title: Jummah in Makkah
itinerary.description: Perform Jummah Prayer at Haram and engage in Ibadah and personal prayers.

itinerary.title: Free Day (Ibadah)
itinerary.description: Day dedicated to personal worship and reflection.

itinerary.title: Makkah Ziarat (Included)
itinerary.description: Guided visit to important holy sites in Makkah.

itinerary.title: Free Day & Last Tawaf
itinerary.description: Free time for Ziarat or Ibadah. Perform Last Tawaf (Tawaf Al-Wida).

itinerary.title: Travel to Madinah
itinerary.description: Travel from Makkah to Madinah. Visit Masjid an-Nabawi, perform Madinah Ziarat, and hotel check-in.

itinerary.title: Riaz ul Jannah Visit & Return
itinerary.description: Free day for Riaz ul Jannah visit and prayers at Masjid an-Nabawi. Transfer to airport for return flight to UAE.

inclusions: Guided Ziarat Tours in Holy Cities
highlights: Faster and convenient Umrah via flight
Ideal for families and busy professionals

umrah.title: Premium Umrah Package by Air – 5 Days
umrah.description: Experience Umrah with comfort, convenience, and premium hospitality. This short-duration package is specially designed for those who want a spiritually fulfilling journey without compromising on quality. Enjoy luxury stays, smooth transfers, and complete guidance throughout your trip.

itinerary.title: Departure & Arrival in Makkah
itinerary.description: Departure from UAE via flight. Arrival at Jeddah Airport and transfer to Makkah. Warm welcome by our guide and check-in at 5-Star VOCO / similar hotel. Perform Umrah under guidance.

itinerary.title: Jummah & Free Day
itinerary.description: Perform Friday Prayer at Haram. Free day for Ibadah, Tawaf, and personal worship.

itinerary.title: Makkah Ziarat
itinerary.description: Guided Ziarat tour of Makkah. Visit important Islamic historical places.

itinerary.title: Final Tawaf & Travel to Madinah
itinerary.description: Perform Final Tawaf and travel to Madinah. Hotel check-in and visit Masjid an-Nabawi.

itinerary.title: Madinah Ziarat
itinerary.description: Guided Ziarat of Madinah. Spend time in prayers at Masjid an-Nabawi.

itinerary.title: Return to UAE
itinerary.description: Transfer to airport for return flight back to UAE. End of a blessed and memorable journey.

inclusions: Guided Ziarat in Both Holy Cities
highlights: Priority support and short trip efficiency
Complete spiritual guidance for busy groups
Ideal for families seeking high comfort
Professional management from start to finish
